title: Bike Sharing — Overview
description: Headline KPIs, the two-year daily pulse, a monthly ledger, and the seasonal shape of demand. Capital Bikeshare, Washington D.C., 2011–2012.

blocks.title: Daily ridership, 2011–2012
blocks.description: Total rentals per day. The upward step into 2012 and the twin summer humps are the whole dataset in one view.

blocks.title: Season profiles (normalized)
blocks.description: Each season as a polygon across five shared dimensions.
